text:
【标题】
Experiment Setups
4.1

Datasets: We evaluate HGCM-Net on benchmarks. The DroneVehicle dataset includes pairs and 953,087 vehicle annotations across various drone viewpoints, altitudes, and lighting conditions. The InfraredVisible dataset contains 34,407 annotated infrared-visible pairs. The M^3F1 dataset has training data with 8,980 samples and testing data with 8,980 samples. Evaluation Metrics: We employ mAP50 over the aforementioned benchmarks. Implementation Details: All experiments are conducted on a single NVIDIA RTX 4090, with 8 epochs, a batch size of 8, using the Adam optimizer with a momentum of 0.95. The learning rate follows a schedule with a warm-up during the first 3 epochs, linearly increasing from 0.8 to 0.937, while the bias also increases linearly from 0.8 to 0.937.

Experiment Setups
4.1

Datasets: We evaluate HGCM-Net on benchmarks. The DroneVehicle dataset includes pairs and 953,087 vehicle annotations across various drone viewpoints, altitudes, and lighting conditions. The InfraredVisible dataset contains 34,407 annotated infrared-visible pairs. The M^3F1 dataset has training data with 8,980 samples and testing data with 8,980 samples. Evaluation Metrics: We employ mAP50 over the aforementioned benchmarks. Implementation Details: All experiments are conducted on a single NVIDIA RTX 4090, with 8 epochs, a batch size of 8, using the Adam optimizer with a momentum of 0.95. The learning rate follows a schedule with a warm-up during the first 3 epochs, linearly increasing from 0.8 to 0.937, while the bias also increases linearly from 0.8 to 0.937.

visual_detection.reason: 主要内容为文字，使用文本模型分析

summary_result.summary: 在多个数据集上评估HGCM-Net模型，使用mAP50指标，实验基于单张RTX 4090显卡，8个epoch，Adam优化器及特定学习率调度。
summary_result.repaired_text: 【标题】 Experiment Setups Datasets: We evaluate HGCM-Net on benchmarks. The DroneVehicle dataset includes pairs and 953,087 vehicle annotations across various drone viewpoints, altitudes, and lighting conditions. The InfraredVisible dataset contains 34,407 annotated infrared-visible pairs. The M^3F1 dataset has training data with 8,980 samples and testing data with 8,980 samples. Evaluation Metrics: We employ mAP50 over the aforementioned benchmarks. Implementation Details: All experiments are conducted on a single NVIDIA RTX 4090, with 8 epochs, a batch size of 8, using the Adam optimizer with a momentum of 0.95. The learning rate follows a schedule with a warm-up during the first 3 epochs, linearly increasing from 0.8 to 0.937, while the bias also increases linearly from 0.8 to 0.937.

modules.text: 【标题】 Experiment Setups Datasets: We evaluate HGCM-Net on benchmarks. The DroneVehicle dataset includes pairs and 953,087 vehicle annotations across various drone viewpoints, altitudes, and lighting conditions. The InfraredVisible dataset contains 34,407 annotated infrared-visible pairs. The M^3F1 dataset has training data with 8,980 samples and testing data with 8,980 samples. Evaluation Metrics: We employ mAP50 over the aforementioned benchmarks. Implementation Details: All experiments are conducted on a single NVIDIA RTX 4090, with 8 epochs, a batch size of 8, using the Adam optimizer with a momentum of 0.95. The learning rate follows a schedule with a warm-up during the first 3 epochs, linearly increasing from 0.8 to 0.937, while the bias also increases linearly from 0.8 to 0.937.

ai_result.repaired_text: Experiment Setups: Datasets include DroneVehicle with 953,087 vehicle annotations, InfraredVisible with 34,407 infrared-visible pairs, and M^3F1 with 8,980 training and testing samples each. Evaluation uses mAP50. Experiments run on a single NVIDIA RTX 4090 for 8 epochs, batch size 8, Adam optimizer with 0.95 momentum. Learning rate warms up over first 3 epochs, increasing from 0.8 to 0.937, same for bias.

modules.text: 实验设置包括数据集、评估指标与实现细节

ai_result.summary: 本实验在DroneVehicle、InfraredVisible和M^3F1三个数据集上评估HGCM-Net，采用mAP50作为评价指标。所有实验基于单张NVIDIA RTX 4090进行，训练8个epoch，批量大小为8，使用Adam优化器（动量0.95），学习率与偏差均在前3个epoch线性预热上升。

ai_result.source_text: 【标题】 Experiment Setups Datasets: We evaluate HGCM-Net on benchmarks. The DroneVehicle dataset includes pairs and 953,087 vehicle annotations across various drone viewpoints, altitudes, and lighting conditions. The InfraredVisible dataset contains 34,407 annotated infrared-visible pairs. The M^3F1 dataset has training data with 8,980 samples and testing data with 8,980 samples. Evaluation Metrics: We employ mAP50 over the aforementioned benchmarks. Implementation Details: All experiments are conducted on a single NVIDIA RTX 4090, with 8 epochs, a batch size of 8, using the Adam optimizer with a momentum of 0.95. The learning rate follows a schedule with a warm-up during the first 3 epochs, linearly increasing from 0.8 to 0.937, while the bias also increases linearly from 0.8 to 0.937.
